SEARCH
モジュール org.commonutils

パッケージ org.commonutils.lang

package org.commonutils.lang
Language-level helpers: strings, character sequences, numeric strings, and wrappers aligned with Objects. Prefer this package for text and scalar parsing; use org.commonutils.util for collections and maps.

Main entry points

  • StringSupport — empty/blank, trim/strip, padding, length counting, safe equality
  • LengthCounter / Lengths — how to count CharSequence length (code units, code points, East Asian columns)
  • NumberSupport — digit checks, parsing with defaults, clamp
  • ObjectSupport — forwarding to Objects plus extra helpers
  • クラス
    説明
    LengthCounter
    Strategy for measuring the "length" of a CharSequence.
    Lengths
    Built-in LengthCounter strategies.
    NumberSupport
    Static helpers for numeric strings and simple bounds: digit checks, JDK-compatible parsing with optional defaults, and clamp.
    ObjectSupport
    Static helpers aligned with Objects: almost every method forwards to the JDK so semantics stay identical to the platform.
    StringSupport
    Static helpers for String and CharSequence work: presence checks, safe defaults, content equality, and trimming helpers.
